items.title: Arsenal trio & Fernandes on player of the year shortlist
items.summary: Declan Rice, Gabriel, David Raya, Bruno Fernandes, Erling Haaland and Rayan Cherki are nominated for the Professional Footballers' Association men's player of the year award.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Use of pink ball in bad light a proactive move: Gambhir
items.summary: The decision was one of the recommendations of the Chief Executives Committee that was approved by the ICC Board at a meeting in Ahmedabad
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 'Positive move' - Gambhir throws his weight behind red-ball-pink-ball switch
items.summary: "We've got to give Sai a fair run" - Gautam Gambhir makes it clear that B Sai Sudharsan, and not Devdutt Padikkal, is India's Test No. 3 for the moment
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
